title: InputFromDescription
description: InputFromDescription: Attribute to define an input parameter for a method or constructor, using the description of a member (Type, MemberInfo, ParameterInfo or Enum).

InputName.description: Name of the method parameter this attribute corresponds to.

Classification.description: Classification of the correspondent input parameter, e.g. folder path, quantity etc. ClassificationAttribute: Attribute representing classification of method parameters and object properties, i.e. it tells that a given member is a folder path, quantity etc.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
